programmes.show_description: Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Cailleann Micheál an cloigeann le Réailtín agus ní fhágann sé focal aici. (Micheál loses his patience with Réailtín and she is left speechless.)
Feicfear caomhantóirí ag iarraidh dúlra Shléibhte Cairp a chosaint sa gclár faisnéis. (This documentary follows conservationists working to restore Carpathia's natural balance.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
I nDún Lúiche a bheidh Síle, baile atá suite i bparóiste Ghaoth Dobhair faoi scáth na hEaragaile. (Dún Lúiche is a small village situated under the imposing Mount Errigal.)
Clár speisialta do Lá Fhéile Pádraig: Téann Cathy Jordan ar an Joanie Madden Folk 'N' Irish Cruise. (Cathy Jordan joins the Joanie Madden Folk 'N' Irish Cruise.)
Tugann Louise, Séaghan agus Proinsias aghaidh ar Kraków an tseachtain seo. (This week, our three adventurers take a deep dive into Kraków's rich history.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Is í Síle Ní Chonghaile a bheidh ag léamh scéal an lae inniu. (Today's story of the day is read by Síle Ní Chonghaile.)
Beidh rás ag Cody agus JJ ar a dtrírothaigh inniu. (Cody and JJ are playing on their tricycles.)
Tá Wally, JJ agus Boba ag iarraidh dul ag seoltóireacht. (Wally the wolf tries to show his crew mates, JJ and Boba, the way to sail a pirate ship.)
Bíonn spraoi ag Dearg ag dathú. (Red has fun coloring.)
Cuireann Cory aithne ar Winifred Eiteach. (Cory makes a new friend in Winifred Wings.)
Tá Gecko tinn agus caithfidh na meicneoirí eile an obair a dhéanamh. (The other mechanics must cover for Gecko when he's sick.)
Ag foghlaim faoi éadach a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about clothing today.)
Bíonn an-spraoi ag Pip & ag Posy ag spraoi le culaith róbó Posy nó go dtéann rudaí ó smacht. (Pip and Posy have fun playing with Posy's robot costume until things get out of hand.)
Tá an féar sa bhforaois i bhfad ró-fhada le bheith ag spraoi ann. (The grass in the forest is too long to play on.)
Goideann na Coileáin cnámha dineasáir ach a bhuíochas do Gekko bíonn siad in ann iad a fháil arís. (Gekko's knowledge of dinosaurs helps the team get back prehistoric bones.)
Tá Wussywat ag cuardach áite a mbeidh gach duine te teolaí sa gheimhreadh. (Wussywat's looking for shelter so that everyone will be warm and cosy during winter.)
Tá ríméad ar Clifford go bhfuil sé leis an oíche a chaitheamh tigh Bhláithín. (Clifford is excited to have a sleepover with Bailey.)
Is maith leis na cairde a bheith ag spraoi in éineacht leis na réaltaí san oíche. (The pups have fun playing with the stars at night.)
Tógann Bokchoydachtalach Minty ar ais chuig a nead. (Minty tries to fly and is mistaken for a baby Bokchoydactyl by its mother.)
Tá Dot ag iarraidh a bheith in éineacht le gach duine ag an am céanna. (Dot wants to do everything with everybody all at the same time.)
Taispeánann Henry pictiúir d'éan speisialta d'Ella ina leabhar éin. (Henry shows Ella a picture of a very special bird called The Yellow Plumed Warbler, in his bird book.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Cé gur iarr Lola ar Mhamó agus Daideo scútar a fháil di, is scátaí oighir atá uaithi i ndáiríre. (Having begged Granny and Granddad for a scooter, Lola really wants ice skates.)
Rachaidh na Petronix go Peiriú le teacht i gcabhair ar éan condair. (The Petronix Team go to Peru to rescue a condor from mean MacTrapp.)
Ní mór do Pat teacht i gcabhair ar Lola nuair a fhéachann na Guanos cur isteach uirthi. (Pat must come to the rescue when the Guanos try to sabotage Lola.)
Tá láithreoir nua ag teastáil ar chlár teilifíse na scoile & tá Angelo & Tracy san iomaíocht don phost. (Tracy & Angelo both want to be the school's new TV anchorperson.)
Ní mó ná sásta atá Dónall go bhfuil Mam ag diúltú greannán a thabhairt dó. (Dónall is unhappy when Mum refuses to give him his comic.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Amhrán spraíúil faoi uachtar reoite brocailí a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about broccoli ice cream.)
Is Sár-Dhronuilleog é Blocuimhir a Dó Dhéag! (Ten and Two make Twelve, who discovers he is a super-rectangle with amazing special powers.)
Téann Corcra ar aistear beag sa Domhan nua seo. (Purple goes on a little adventure in this new World.)
Tá sé ag cinneadh ar an mBéar Beag cuimhneamh ar orduithe na gcustaiméirí uilig. (Little Bear is having big trouble remembering everyone's ice cream orders.)
Cuireann Pompon agus Rita seó le chéile chun slán a fhágáil le Agnes. (Pompon and Rita plan a farewell show for Agnes.)
Cad atá i mbosca cultacha Sheáin? Eitleog, eala agus eireaball ar ndóigh. (What is in Seán's box of costumes? A kite, a swan and a tail of course.)
Socraíonn Pip agus Posy an lá uilig a chaitheamh in éineacht le Jamila. (Pip & Posy see Jamila by herself and assume she's lonely & decide to spend the day playing with her.)
Clár ealaíne ina ndéanann Máire Treasa ceardaíocht agus ealaín lena cara Scú Scú Scuab. (An exciting art series where Máire Treasa does arts and crafts with Scú Scú Scuab.)
Tá Dot agus a hathair ag iarraidh cóisir a eagrú. (Dot and her father are trying to organise a party.)
Socraíonn Dot agus Mamó saoire a bheith acu sa bhaile. (Dot and her granny go on a staycation.)
Samhlaíonn Sonaí a shaol ina thraenálaí madra nuair a bheidh sé mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Sonaí imagines his life as a dog trainer when he grows up.)
Tá togra scoile le déanamh ag Zou. Téann sé féin agus Daideo chuig an trá. (Zou and Grandpa go to the beach today.)
Ar chlár an lae inniu beidh madra ar ghluaisrothar agus madra eile atá i ngrá le hiasc. (Today we have a dog on a motorcycle and a bulldog falls in love with a fish.)
An Br. Ciarán Mac Cormaic a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín an tseachtain seo. (Brother Ciarán Mac Cormaic from Nenagh is this week's guest.)
Tá na buachaillí is óige ag iarraidh go dtabharfadh Lois cead dóibh gluaisrothar beag a fháil. (The younger boys try to convince Lois to let them have a mini-bike.)
Cuirtear an dallamullóg ar Coach agus ceannaíonn sé seanscála. (Coach is conned into buying an antique scale that also prints out fortunes.)
Sraith a dhéanann ceiliúradh ar amhráin a bhíodh againn ag éirí aníos. (Series which celebrates and takes a fresh look at the songs of our schooldays.)
Cuirtear ceolchoirm charthanachta Seth Hazlitt i mbaol nuair a mharaítear príomhamhránaí an bhanna. (Seth Hazlitt's benefit concert is endangered when the lead singer is killed.)
Clár speisialta do Lá Fhéile Pádraig: Téann Cathy Jordan ar an Joanie Madden Folk 'N' Irish Cruise. (Cathy Jordan joins the Joanie Madden Folk 'N' Irish Cruise.)
Beidh Paul ag dul ó oileán go hoileán sa gclár seo, téann sé go Baile Bhòid agus go Cumaradh ansin. (Paul begins his island-hopping escapade at Rothesay before heading to Cumbrae.)
Rogha de na hamhráin ab fhearr a chas Patrick Feeney ar shraitheanna Glór Tíre. (A selection of some of the best of Patrick Feeney's performances through the years on Glór Tíre.)
Tá rún ag Lisa agus Paul as Sydney saol na cathrach a fhágáil ina ndiaidh. (Sydneysiders Lisa and Paul are going to leave an established city life behind.)

Leanfar ocht gcinn déag de phiongainí agus iad ag siúl, ag léim agus ag snámh leo. (March, hop and swim along with the 18 members of this much-loved penguin family.)

Tugann Doireann Ní Ghlacáin aghaidh ar an Oirthear na Gaillimhe ag bualadh le ceoltóirí na háite. (Doireann Ní Ghlacáin travels around East Galway, meeting local musicians.)
Bíonn neart le feiceáil ar an ráschúrsa ag Seó Chluain Meala i dTiobraid Árainn. (The racecourse is busy at the historic Clonmel Show in Tipperary.)
Cuirtear an dallamullóg ar Coach agus ceannaíonn sé seanscála. (Coach is conned into buying an antique scale that also prints out fortunes.)
Clár faisnéise ina mbreathnaítear ar an tionchar a bhí ag an gcóras breithiúnach in Éirinn ar mhná na tíre. (Documentary series that examines the impact of Irish law on women.)
Tarraingítear aird ar seanchás nuair a dhúnmharaítear bean agus í ar tí leabhar a scríobh faoin gcoir. (A case is reopened when a woman researching for a crime novel is murdered.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Tá cuid de na hiarrthóirí ag súil go mbeidh siad in ann tuilleadh rís a fháil. (In a Survivor first, castaways attempt a negotiation for rice.)
Ar an 5ú Deireadh Fómhair 2007 dúnmharaíodh Amanda Jenkins go brúidiúil. (October 5th 2007, 27 year old Amanda Jenkins was brutally murdered by her fiancé.)
Craoladh ar imeachtaí na maidine de riar na hoibre i nDáil Éireann. (Coverage of today's proceedings in Dáil Éireann.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)

Tugann Louise, Séaghan agus Proinsias aghaidh ar Chorcaigh an tseachtain seo. (This week, our three travellers are not venturing far from home as they head to Cork.)

Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tagann Bréidín agus Clúmh ar shleamhnán! (Tweedy and Fluff find a slide!)
Téann na Singalings ar safari! Beidh neart ainmhithe le feiceáil. (The Singalings are on safari! There's plenty of animals to see.)
Tá Dora agus Bróigín i dTír na Sí. An mbeidh siad in ann an draíocht a thabhairt slán? (Dora and Boots are in Fairytale Land.)
Tá Abby agus Rudy le páirt a ghlacadh i rás carranna. (Basket turns Abby and Rudy into a racing team and they compete in a car race.)
Tá comórtas damhsa ar siúl agus is é Zac an moltóir. (Pip sets the rules of a dance competition and appoints Zac as the judge.)
Tagann Boilbín lena bróga nua a bhailiú ach ansin imíonn sí as radharc. (Pilla arrives to collect some shoes but then disappears.)
Caithfidh Gekko guaim a choinneáil air féin. (Gekko has to be responsible for the sake of everyone else's Easter eggs, will he succeed?)
Tá Wussywat ag iarraidh bealach a fháil le fanacht tirim sa bháisteach. (Wussywat wants to know how to stay dry now the rain has started.)
Tá Zou trína chéile mar go bhfuil go leor dá chuid rudaí ag dul amú air. (Zou is a little upset today as he seems to keep losing his things.)
Tá peata nua faighte ag Ricky agus Tyra. (Today, Ricky and Tyra find a new pet in the park.)
Castar Pis-Rex gortaithe ar Ginger agus ní fada go mbíonn sí mór leis na Piseanna-Rex óga. (Ginger encounters an injured Mamma Pea-Rex who quickly befriends the baby Pea-Rexes.)
Thaitneodh le Ruby dul chuig ceolchoirm. (Ruby wants to go to a concert.)
Féachann Ella le banna tionlacain a chur le chéile a bheidh in ann seinm in éineacht lena hathair. (Ella decides to put together a backing band to play with her dad.)

Deir Lola lena cara go rachaidh sí ag spraoi léi ach ansin tugann Marv cuireadh chuig cóisir di. (Lola promises to play with her friend, but then Marv invites her to his party.)
Tá gach gasúr ag iarraidh an bhréagáin 'Buachaill Báire'. (All the children want a 'Buachaill Báire' toy, unaware the toys are under a spell.)
Goideann Marcus agus Sleamhnaí ticéid do cheolchoirm ó chailín beag. (Marcus and Sleamhnaí steal a concert ticket from a little girl.)
Tá sé in am ag Angelo "pointí bónais" a fháil ón múinteoir. (Angelo needs to accumulate some "Brownie Points" with Mr. Foot.)
Teastaíonn eolas ó Dhónall le cur isteach ar chomórtas raidió. (Dónall needs information in order to enter a radio competition.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Amhrán spraíúil faoi chúig lacha bheaga. (A fun song about five little ducks.)
Tá go leor bealaí ann le dronuilleog a dhéanamh is cosúil! (Twelve shows the others how to put their blocks into columns and rows.)
Bíonn an-spraoi ag na Dathanna ag maisiú rudaí. (The Colours have lots of fun decorating today.)
Cuireann na Blociontais ar fad seó tallainne ar bun. (It's time to join the Wonderblocks for a wonderful talent show!)
Beidh an coimeádaí zú John ag tabhairt fíonchaora agus bananaí do na giobúin inniu. (John the zookeeper prepares a meal of bananas and grapes for the gibbons.)
Níl Zac ag iarraidh scéal a aithris do Pip ná do Posy. (Zac is reluctant to act out a story so he makes up a series of daft excuses.)
Bíonn ríméad ar Ribín nuair a fhaigheann sí fáinne draíochta. (Ribín is delighted when she is given a magic ring.)
Daltaí Ghaelscoil Ultain i Muineachán a rachaidh i mbun pinn an tseachtain seo chun amhrán a chumadh faoi bhreacadh an lae. (Music series for children presented by John Sharpson.)
Tá George ag tnúth le dul ar saoire le Fear an Hata Bhuí ach tá moill ar an eitilt. (The Man with the Yellow Hat and George go to the airport but all flights have been delayed.)
Samhlaíonn Faith-Leigh a saol ina maisitheoir ingne nuair a bheidh sí mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Faith-Leigh imagines her life as a nail technician when she grows up.)
Caithfidh Daideo, Zou & Zak glacadh le lear mór ábhair atá le seachadadh i siopa Aintín Zelda inniu. (Grandpa & Zou have to accept a big delivery in Aunt Zelda's shop.)
Ar chlár an lae inniu beidh madra ar shleamhnán agus coileán atá ag iarraidh a leaba a fháil ar ais! (On today's programme we have a dog sledding and a puppy takes back its bed.)
Líle Ní Annracháin as Cluain Dolcáin a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín an tseachtain seo. (Líle Ní Annracháin from Clondalkin is this week¿s guest on Comhrá.)
Téann Malcolm, Reese, Dewey agus Stevie chuig aonach i ngan fhios. (Malcolm, Reese, Dewey and Stevie sneak out to a county fair.)
Faigheann Diane amach go mba mhinic le Sam dul go Vermont lena chairde chun mná a mhealladh. (Diane learns that Sam used to seek women at ski trips with his friends in Vermont.)
Sraith a dhéanann ceiliúradh ar amhráin a bhíodh againn ag éirí aníos. (Series which celebrates and takes a fresh look at the songs of our schooldays.)
Níl mórán suime ag na gardaí a bheith páirteach i bhfiosrúchán Jessica. (The police are reluctant to become involved in Jessicas investigation.)
Grúpa ilghnéitheach is ea na reiptílí leis na mílte speiceas. (Reptiles are a diverse group with thousands of species slithering & swimming the planet.)
Tugann Paul aghaidh ar Garbhchríocha na hAlban ar sheanrothar. (Paul travels by vintage bike through the spectacular scenery of the central highlands.)
Rogha de na hamhráin ab fhearr a chas Louise Morrissey ar stáitse Ghlór Tíre. (A selection of some of the best of Louise Morrissey's performances through the years on Glór Tíre.)
Tá Tanya agus a mac Jordan ag iarraidh Perth a fhágáil agus bogadh go Queensland. (Tanya and her son Jordan are keen to move from the Perth suburbs to tropical North Queensland.)

Tugtar léargas ar na pobail i sé cheantar i nGaeltacht Mhúscraí i gContae Chorcaí sa tsraith seo. (In this series we get an insight into the communities of the Múscraí Gaeltacht.)
